1.description: Owner claims ownership, no crypto proof
1.label: linked

automated_loom_settlement_v1.label: Automated Loom Settlement Hot Wallet
automated_loom_settlement_v1.notes: Segregated automated hot wallet. Do not commingle with founder treasury sources.
automated_loom_settlement_v1.verification_details: Private key generated in-process by ops_provision_hot_wallet.py and written to an operator-controlled secret path on this host.

company_treasury_multisig_target.label: Company Treasury Multisig (Planned)
company_treasury_multisig_target.notes: Target: Gnosis Safe on Base with 2-of-3 signer threshold. Not yet deployed.
company_treasury_multisig_target.verification_details: Safe multisig planned but not deployed.

company_treasury_v1.label: Company Treasury (Base)
company_treasury_v1.notes: Rotated 2026-03-15 after prior key leak. Receives owner capital deposits.
company_treasury_v1.verification_details: Owner claims ownership. No SIWE signature on file.

founder_exchange_linked.label: Founder OKX-Linked
founder_exchange_linked.notes: Exchange-linked wallets cannot receive payouts. Self-custody required.
founder_exchange_linked.verification_details: OKX deposit screen observed. NOT self-custody. Exchange controls the key.

observed_sender_17fe.label: Observed External Sender
observed_sender_17fe.notes: Observed on-chain only. No relationship to project established.
observed_sender_17fe.verification_details: Seen on-chain as sender. No ownership claim. Not founder wallet.
